arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar turn down FC Porto’s Koopmeiners approach: “Peer is happy at AZ and we are happy with Peer”
arts.sum: As per VI, AZ Almaar's director of football Max Huiberts was unsuccessfully approached by FC Porto for Peer Koopmeiners (24) on deadline day.

A run down of the biggest transfer deadline day deals in the Eredivisie. Ajax Feyenoord PSV Eindhoven AZ Alkmaar Fortuna Sittard Go Ahead Eagles Heerenveen Heracles Almelo Sparta Rotterdam Twente Willem II RKC Waalwijk Almere City Groningen FC Utrecht NAC Breda PEC Zwolle NEC Nijmegen The post Eredivisie Transfer Deadline Day Round-Up appeared first on Football Oranje.
